news.title: Road closed as metro Atlanta police investigate barricaded suspect
news.summary: A road block is in place in part of Clayton County as police investigate an incident involving a barricaded suspect.

news.title: Isaiah Turner arrested for malice murder in DeKalb County shooting, sheriff reports
news.summary: Isaiah Turner, 20, is in custody, charged with malice murder in the March shooting death of Jamar Schaffers, according to the DeKalb County Sheriff's Office.

news.title: Police investigate overnight shooting of 18-year-old in southwest Atlanta
news.summary: The Atlanta Police Department is investigating the shooting of an 18-year-old just after midnight on Sunday.

news.title: Suspect in Top 10 most wanted list arrested for child sexual abuse, sheriff’s office says
news.summary: The Fulton County Sheriff’s Office Strategic Enforcement Unit said they apprehended James Anthony Zachery, a sex trafficking suspect on the county’s Top 10 Most Wanted list, on Friday afternoon in Dec

news.title: Deadly crash on interstate in Sandy Springs under investigation
news.summary: Sandy Springs police said officers are investigating a deadly crash on Interstate 285 in the early morning hours of Saturday.

news.title: James Anthony Zachery: Fugitive wanted for child rape apprehended
news.summary: Fulton County deputies arrested a Top 10 Most Wanted sex trafficking suspect Friday afternoon in Decatur on charges of raping a 10-year-old child.

news.title: Gunfire at Atlantic Station leaves 28-year-old man hospitalized
news.summary: One person was hospitalized after an early-morning shooting stemming from a fight inside an establishment at Atlantic Station.

news.title: Middle Georgia prison drone smuggling busts nets 2 metro Atlanta arrests
news.summary: Deputies locked up two men on I-75 southbound after finding drugs and a drone meant for prison smuggling.

news.title: Fulton County arrest 'Most Wanted' suspect on sex crime charges against 10-year-old child
news.summary: Deputies said James Anthony Zachery was arrested in Decatur on July 17, on multiple charges, including trafficking a person for sexual servitude.
